document_summary: Sohu's media coverage of the First China Digital Marketing Conference, hosted by the Digital Marketing Committee of the China Advertising Association of Commerce under the auspices of the Chinese Ministry of Commerce, held at the Beijing National Convention Center in January 2016. Shows the prestige of the conference where Liu served as judge, with participation by Tencent, Alibaba, Baidu, Google, and other major companies.

snippets.text: In the era of "Internet+", digital marketing has become a major factor in driving brand influence. The "First China Digital Marketing Conference", hosted by the Digital Marketing Committee of the China Advertising Association of Commerce under the auspices of the Chinese Ministry of Commerce, will be held at the Beijing National Convention Center from January 21 to 22, 2016, to assist Chinese brands in building digital transformation and upgrading, while promoting the development of the entire digital marketing industry chain ecosystem.
snippets.subject: First China Digital Marketing Conference
snippets.reasoning: Establishes the conference's prestige: hosted by DMCC under Ministry of Commerce auspices, at Beijing National Convention Center. This is the event where Liu served as judge.

snippets.text: The theme of this conference is "Building the Right Path in the Intelligent Digital Era", which will bring comprehensive discussions on digital marketing in the era of Internet+ from a global perspective. The conference has attracted internet giants such as Tencent, Alibaba, Baidu, Google, NetEase, Sohu, Sina, Acxiom, Criteo, and hundreds of domestic and foreign brand owners and innovative digital marketing companies to participate.
snippets.subject: First China Digital Marketing Conference
snippets.reasoning: Key evidence of conference caliber: participation by Tencent, Alibaba, Baidu, Google, NetEase, Sohu, Sina, Acxiom, Criteo. Demonstrates the stature of the event where Liu judged.

snippets.text: Facing the new challenges encountered by Chinese brand building in the "Internet+" era, combined with the achievements of the digital marketing industry, the conference has set up eight major awards, aiming to encourage and recognize brand owners, digital companies, media institutions, and practitioners who innovate through digitization.
snippets.subject: First China Digital Marketing Conference
snippets.reasoning: Describes the eight major award categories that Liu judged, establishing the scope and significance of the judging role.

snippets.text: The inaugural China Digital Marketing Conference will bring about a new integration of the entire Internet ecosystem, becoming the weather vane of digital marketing in 2016.
snippets.subject: First China Digital Marketing Conference
snippets.reasoning: Conference described as 'the weather vane of digital marketing in 2016', establishing its significance in the industry.
